model.description: Model ID to use. Can be a Hugging Face model ID (e.g., meta-llama/Llama-3-70b-chat-hf) or a provider-specific identifier.

messages.description: List of messages comprising the conversation

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on frequency in text so far

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on presence in text so far

reasoning_effort.description: Constrains effort on reasoning for models that support it. Common values are none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where generation will stop

stream.description: Whether to stream partial responses using SSE

tools.description: List of tools the model may call

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return per position
